text:
Mobile navigation finally got an anchor. 

We merged a PR this week adding a proper scroll-area primitive and fixing the mobile drawer footer. If you've ever built a mobile web UI, you know the exact kind of scrolling weirdness this fixes. It's a small update, but your thumbs will thank us when you're generating from your phone.

Everything is live, open source, and ready to use. Code is in the repo.

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #webdev #frontend #buildinpublic #uiux
